name: Red's Buttermilk Pineapple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the crushed pineapple to boiling.
2. Add the JELLO and stir until it dissolves completely.
3. When the mixture is cool, add the buttermilk and fold in the CoolWhip and chopped nuts.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9 x 13 inch dish and chill.
